name: unity-testing
description: Prefer unity_tests MCP when available, compile Unity projects, run Unity Test Framework tests, and write focused tests.

interface.shortDescription: MCP-first Unity diagnostics, compilation, tests, and test authoring.
interface.longDescription: Prefers the unity_tests MCP server for Unity diagnostics, compile checks, and targeted EditMode or PlayMode test runs, with a pinned unity-test-runner fallback. Also guides focused Unity test authoring.
defaultPrompt: Use unity_tests MCP diagnostics for this Unity project when available.
Check whether this Unity project compiles.
Run the relevant Unity tests and diagnose failures.
Add focused Unity tests for this behavior.
